name: Larvik Golfklubb

course.courseType_en: 18-hole parkland course with seaside character plus 9-hole short course
course.viewDescription: Larvik Golfklubb - 18-hulls parklandbane med seaside-preg designet av Jan Sederholm. Par 72. Pluss 9-hulls korthullsbane (åpent helårs). Driving range (13 matter), 2 greener, øvingsområde med bunker. Klubbhus, pro shop (09:00-16:00), café, simulator. El-vogn og tralle-utleie. VTG-kurs, junior/senior/elite-programmer. Custom fitting, privattreninger. Webkamera. Handicap-grense 54.
course.viewDescription_en: Larvik Golf Club - 18-hole parkland course with seaside character designed by Jan Sederholm. Par 72. Plus 9-hole short course (open year-round). Driving range (13 mats), 2 greens, practice area with bunker. Clubhouse, pro shop (09:00-16:00), cafe, simulator. Electric buggy and trolley hire. Road to Golf course, junior/senior/elite programmes. Custom fitting, private lessons. Webcam. Handicap limit 54.

description: Larvik Golfklubb - 18-hulls parklandbane med seaside-preg designet av svenske Jan Sederholm, grunnlagt 1988. Par 72 (Seasidebanen). Pluss egen 9-hulls korthullsbane for pitch & putt. Lengde, vind, rough og strategisk plasserte vann og bunkere gir utfordringer for spillere på alle nivåer.
description_en: Larvik Golf Club - 18-hole parkland course with a seaside feel designed by Swedish architect Jan Sederholm, founded 1988. Par 72 (Seaside Course). Plus a separate 9-hole short course for pitch and putt. Length, wind, rough and strategically placed water and bunkers provide challenges for players of all levels.

season.winterUse: 9-hulls korthullsbane åpent hele året når snøfritt
season.winterUse_en: 9-hole short course open year-round when snow-free

2025.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee 2025 Seasidebanen: Hverdager 600 kr, helg/helligdager og 23. juni - 10. august 700 kr. Junior (tom. 19 år) hverdager 300 kr, helg 350 kr. 9-hullsrunde hverdager 350 kr, helg 450 kr. Korthullsbanen: Senior dagsgreenfee 200 kr, Junior dagsgreenfee 100 kr.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee 2025 Seaside Course: Weekdays 600 NOK, weekends/public holidays and 23 June - 10 August 700 NOK. Junior (up to 19 years) weekdays 300 NOK, weekends 350 NOK. 9-hole round weekdays 350 NOK, weekends 450 NOK. Short course: Senior day green fee 200 NOK, Junior day green fee 100 NOK.
2025.notes: Korthullsbanen åpent hele året (snøfritt). Webkamera tilgjengelig. Greenfee-samarbeid med samarbeidsklubber. Booking via GolfBox 3-7 dager før spill avhengig av kategori. Vipps #11891. Norsk Seniorgolf Lojalitetskort: 500 kr pr. runde (maks 3 runder), hverdager før kl. 14:00, ikke juli.
2025.notes_en: Short course open year-round (snow-free). Webcam available. Green fee cooperation with partner clubs. Booking via GolfBox 3-7 days in advance depending on category. Vipps #11891. Norwegian Senior Golf Loyalty Card: 500 NOK per round (max 3 rounds), weekdays before 14:00, not July.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee Seasidebanen: Hverdager 600 kr, helg/helligdager 700 kr. Junior (tom. 19 år) hverdager 300 kr, helg 350 kr. 9-hullsrunde hverdager 350 kr, helg 450 kr. Korthullsbanen: Dagsgreenfee senior 200 kr, junior 100 kr.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee Seaside Course: Weekdays 600 NOK, weekends/public holidays 700 NOK. Junior (up to 19 years) weekdays 300 NOK, weekends 350 NOK. 9-hole round weekdays 350 NOK, weekends 450 NOK. Short course: Day green fee senior 200 NOK, junior 100 NOK.
2026.notes: Priser per februar 2026 (fortsatt 2025-priser publisert på nettside). El-vogn gratis for gjester med NGF-klassifisering/dispensasjon. Korthullsbanen åpent hele året (snøfritt). Betaling i Pro Shop/Servicepunkt eller Vipps #11891. El-vognutleie krever 18+ år.
2026.notes_en: Prices as of February 2026 (2025 prices still published on website). Electric buggy free for guests with NGF classification/dispensation. Short course open year-round (snow-free). Payment at Pro Shop/Service point or Vipps #11891. Electric buggy hire requires age 18+.

2026.name: Medlem - full spillerett
2026.description: Full spillerett på Seasidebanen (18-hullsbanen). Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Full playing rights on the Seaside Course (18-hole course). Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Hverdag
2026.description: Spillerett på hverdager. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Playing rights on weekdays. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Ungsenior
2026.description: For medlemmer 20-30 år. Full spillerett. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: For members aged 20-30. Full playing rights. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Medlem - spillerett korthullsbanen
2026.description: Spillerett på 9-hulls korthullsbanen. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Playing rights on the 9-hole short course. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Medlem - greenfee
2026.description_en: Green fee membership. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: VTG-medlem
2026.description: For de som har tatt VTG-kurs 2024, 2025 eller 2026. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: For those who completed Road to Golf course in 2024, 2025 or 2026. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Junior 12-19 år
2026.description: Junior med full spillerett. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Junior with full playing rights. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Junior tom. 11 år
2026.description: Junior under 12 år med full spillerett. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Junior under 12 with full playing rights. Includes club fee and NGF fee.

2026.name: Klubbmedlem
2026.description: Gir lokal og nasjonal spillerett uten spillerett på hjemmebane. Inkluderer klubbkontingent og NGF-avgift.
2026.description_en: Provides local and national playing rights without playing rights at home course. Includes club fee and NGF fee.
